2026-05-01T19:59:22.8056049Z ##[group]Run # Determine mode from input or schedule
2026-05-01T19:59:22.8056973Z [36;1m# Determine mode from input or schedule[0m
2026-05-01T19:59:22.8057566Z [36;1mif [ -n "$INPUT_MODE" ]; then[0m
2026-05-01T19:59:22.8058075Z [36;1m  MODE="$INPUT_MODE"[0m
2026-05-01T19:59:22.8058578Z [36;1melif [ "$SCHEDULE" = "0 7 * * *" ]; then[0m
2026-05-01T19:59:22.8059146Z [36;1m  MODE=current[0m
2026-05-01T19:59:22.8059617Z [36;1melif [ "$SCHEDULE" = "0 17 * * *" ]; then[0m
2026-05-01T19:59:22.8060142Z [36;1m  MODE=latest[0m
2026-05-01T19:59:22.8060680Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-05-01T19:59:22.8061057Z [36;1m  MODE=next[0m
2026-05-01T19:59:22.8061442Z [36;1mfi[0m
2026-05-01T19:59:22.8061807Z [36;1mexport MODE[0m
2026-05-01T19:59:22.8062270Z [36;1mbash scripts/detect-skia-milestones.sh[0m
